response.justification: While the candidate exceeds educational requirements with 20 years of professional experience and demonstrates strong performance optimization skills in distributed systems, the resume lacks the specialized domain expertise required for a Principal Performance Architect role. No evidence of SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, hardware-software co-design, or deep neural network workload optimization—all core requirements. Background is primarily application-level full-stack development rather than hardware architecture and AI accelerator optimization.
strengths: 20+ years of professional software engineering experience exceeds Bachelor's + 8-year requirement
Proven low-latency and high-throughput system optimization expertise (microseconds-scale performance work at Dunnhumby)
Hardware awareness from embedded systems and robotics development background
concerns: No SoC or IP modeling experience despite being explicitly required for the role
Lacks GPU architecture, AI accelerator workload analysis, and DNN optimization expertise—all preferred/required qualifications
Career history is application-level full-stack development; no hardware-software co-design or system architecture at infrastructure level
